board.name: VELA_IF310_DVK
board.summary: The Infineon CYW55310 is a low-power, single-chip device that supports Bluetooth®/Bluetooth® Low Energy 5.3, including Basic Rate (BDR), Enhanced Data Rate (EDR), and Bluetooth® Low Energy. The device supports LE audio with LC3 codec, LE long range, LE 2 Mbps, LE mesh, LE isochronous channels, and advertising extensions. It features integrated on-chip power amplifiers with 0 dBm, +13 dBm, and +19 dBm output power paths optimized for best efficiency, an integrated power management unit (PMU), 768 KB SRAM, 2048 KB ROM, and a 4-wire UART host interface. The CYW55310 is designed for IoT devices requiring minimal power consumption and compact size, targeting applications such as smart watches, smart glasses, AR/VR devices, IP cameras, door locks, and smart speakers. It operates over the -40°C to +85°C temperature range and is available in a 0.35 mm pitch WLBGA package.
board.prov_capabilities: arduino bsp_gen4 bt cat5 cyw55513 cyw55xxx cyw955513evk_01 flash_0k hal i2c i2s led low_power mcu_gp memory pdm qspi rtc sdio pot spi sram_768k switch tdm uart wifi
board.description:
Kit Features:
  • CYW55310 Bluetooth®/Bluetooth® Low Energy 5.3 single-chip solution
  • Supports BDR, EDR, LE audio (LC3 codec), LE long range, LE 2 Mbps, LE mesh, and advertising extensions
  • Dual TDM/I2S audio interfaces supporting HFP, A2DP, and LE audio use cases
  • PDM interface for digital microphone connectivity
  • USB Type-C connector for power, programming, and USB-UART bridge

Kit Contents:
  • VELA IF310 DVK evaluation board
  • M.2 to FFC adapter board
  • 30-pin FFC cable
  • USB Type-C to Type-C cable
  • Six jumper wires (5 inches each)
  • Quick Start Guide
